events.text: Wílmar Barrios (Colombia) is shown the yellow card.
Santiago Arias (Colombia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Carlos Sánchez (Colombia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Jordan Henderson (England) is shown the yellow card.
Goal!  Colombia 0, England 1. Harry Kane (England) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the centre of the goal.
Radamel Falcao (Colombia) is shown the yellow card.
Carlos Bacca (Colombia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Jesse Lingard (England) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  Colombia 1, England 1. Yerry Mina (Colombia) header from the centre of the box to the top left corner. Assisted by Juan Cuadrado with a cross   following a corner.
Juan Cuadrado (Colombia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
